title: Vocea - AI Career Copilot Year: 2026 Tag: AI
tag: AI, Voice Assistant, Career Tech, CV Builder, Job Matching GitHub
problem: Job seekers often struggle to describe their experience clearly, build a professional CV, and identify relevant job opportunities. Traditional CV builders feel like long forms, and they stop once the document is created
built: I built Vocea, a voice-first AI assistant that interviews the user, extracts structured career information, generates an editable professional CV, and recommends similar job opportunities with matching scores. The app includes a business demo flow, fake user profile, CV export, job matching, BEST opportunity highlighting, and a ready-to-copy application pitch
impact: Vocea turns CV creation into a guided conversation and connects the final CV to concrete job opportunities. It reduces friction for candidates and demonstrates how AI can move from document generation to career action. Then commit the actual modified data/projects.json file

title: AI Agents Conversation & Voice Naturalness Analysis
problem: Generate comparable AI-to-AI voice conversations and evaluate vocal behavior reproducibly.
built: Controlled prompts, personas and speakers, realtime AI clients, stereo WAV recording and JSON transcripts.
impact: Experimental pipeline for conversation generation, transcript export and voice-level naturalness metrics.

title: Revision Manager
problem: Help learners organize flashcards and revise knowledge more efficiently.
built: Structured PHP application with routing, controllers, models, authentication and flashcard management.
impact: Web app for registration, login, question/answer cards and revision workflows.

title: CISPA European Championship in Trustworthy AI
problem: Solve AI security tasks under hidden test sets and live scoring.
built: Adversarial examples, generated-image attribution, watermark detection, surrogate models and forensic pipelines.
impact: Ranked 2nd, won qualification for the European final and delivered robust trustworthy AI solutions.

title: Aircraft Corrosion Risk Prediction
problem: Estimate aircraft corrosion risk for each aircraft_id and inspection month.
built: Clean monthly environmental data, build temporal features, train ensembles and validate probability calibration.
impact: End-to-end ML pipeline producing corrosion_risk probabilities between 0 and 1 for submission.

title: Electronic Medical Records Manager
problem: Manage patient medical records through a simple web interface.
built: PHP/MySQL app with forms, listing, filtering and statistics over stored records.
impact: CRUD application to create, view, delete, filter records and display patient statistics.

title: Product Management App
problem: Manage a product catalog with authenticated editing and public browsing.
built: Product creation, category filtering, stock total calculation and discount features with PHP/MySQL.
impact: Inventory app covering product workflows and business calculations.

title: Portfolio Website
problem: Present my profile, experience, skills and projects in one accessible place.
built: Static responsive website with structured sections, project cards and recruiter-friendly content.
impact: Portfolio website optimized for desktop and mobile reading.

title: Fast Food Management App
problem: Model a complete fast-food ordering workflow.
built: Team project with UML, Gantt/PERT planning, MVC architecture, Java interfaces and unit testing.
impact: Application covering account creation, authentication, order, payment and invoice generation.

title: The Mind Terminal Game
problem: Create a terminal version of the cooperative card game with human and robot players.
built: Shell scripts coordinate processes, card distribution, rules, statistics and robot decisions.
impact: Interactive terminal game with decision-tree robot behavior and automatic performance statistics.

title: Fast Fourier Transform Algorithm
problem: Explore a core signal-processing algorithm and its computational behavior.
built: Implemented and experimented with the Fast Fourier Transform in MATLAB.
impact: Algorithmic project focused on numerical computing and frequency-domain analysis foundations.

title: Integrated Gene-Disease Interaction Analysis
problem: Analyze relationships between selected genes and diseases using scientific sources.
built: Retrieve data from Open Targets and Europe PMC, extract passages, cluster text and generate RAG summaries.
impact: CLI analysis workflow producing JSON/CSV outputs, clusters and concise interaction summaries.

title: WebRAG
problem: Let users ask questions, receive contextual answers and provide feedback.
built: Combined FastAPI, SQLite, Chroma vector search, local LLM deployment with Ollama/Mistral and Docker Compose.
impact: Web RAG application with answer generation, feedback collection and stored interaction history.

title: Tennis Game
problem: Create an interactive web experience simulating a tennis match.
built: Used web technologies and Three.js concepts to represent a 3D scene with players and ball movement.
impact: 3D game prototype demonstrating interactive front-end and visual programming skills.

title: Maze Game
problem: Build a playable maze where a user navigates obstacles and reaches the exit.
built: Implemented console game logic, maze configuration and player movement in Java.
impact: Java game focused on control flow, state management and gameplay rules.

title: Lottery Game
problem: Create an interactive lottery game with player profiles and generated game cards.
built: Developed a Java desktop project with profile creation, prize lists and random game generation.
impact: Desktop game strengthening UI design, random logic and software structure.

title: First-Year Web Development Project
problem: Practice advanced web programming fundamentals through an interactive website.
built: Built dynamic forms, Canvas-based 2D elements and JavaScript interactions.
impact: Front-end project consolidating HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Canvas and user interaction basics.

title: AutoSaver
problem: Automatically back up user-selected directories with configurable frequency and stored versions.
built: Designed a client-server system handling authentication, backup configuration, storage spaces and archived file versions.
impact: Java backup application demonstrating network programming, persistence and file-management workflows.
